---
title: "The Rev. John Henry Lloyd"
---

## The Rev. John Henry Lloyd

**Dates:** (b. Essex 1846/7)

### Description

Vicar of Fotheringhay, husband of Katie Johns

### Biography

He was educated at Chichester Theological College 1869-71, deacon 1871, priest 1872, curate of St. Michael Lichfield 1871-2, of Maulden, Ampthill 1875, of Clifton Biggleswade 1877-8.  He married (1873) Ann Catherine Johns.  He was curate in charge of Wormleighton 1880-1 and vicar of Fotheringay 1881-1890, but had no cure by the 1891 volume of Crockfords, and was perhaps living apart from his wife.  He disappears from the <i>Clergy List c</i>. 1900, reappears 1907, but is more continuous in <i>Crockfords</i>; he lived at 90 Canonbury Avenue until about 1933.  [<i>Crockfords, Clergy List</i>, census returns 1871, 81, 91]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
